summary: Comprehensive UX overhaul verification: All edit/create flows converted from Dialog modals to SlidePanel overlays. Tested login, Beneficiaries add/edit, Messages create/edit, Vault upload/edit, and DAV add/edit. All SlidePanel components working correctly with proper data-testid attributes and back arrow buttons.

messages_edit_panel.note: Edit pencil opens SlidePanel inline instead of navigating to /messages/:id/edit

dav_add_panel.note: Panel respects header area, not positioned too high

dav_getting_started_popup.note: Popup only shows on FIRST credential, not subsequent entries

navigation_speed.note: Core pages eagerly loaded, no long skeleton delays

pages_converted.BeneficiariesPage.js: Dialog replaced with SlidePanel for add/edit (line 682-974)
pages_converted.MessagesPage.js: Dialog replaced with SlidePanel for create/edit (line 748-1177)
pages_converted.VaultPage.js: Upload and Edit Dialogs replaced with SlidePanel (line 808-978, 1233-1320)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All SlidePanel conversions verified working correctly: 1) Beneficiaries add/edit uses SlidePanel with prepopulated forms. 2) Messages create/edit uses SlidePanel - edit pencil opens inline panel, not route navigation. 3) Vault upload/edit uses SlidePanel. 4) DAV add/edit uses SlidePanel with correct positioning. 5) Getting Started popup only shows on first DAV credential (wasFirstEntry + sessionStorage check). 6) Core pages eagerly loaded for fast navigation. 7) SlidePanel CSS positions correctly on desktop (offsets for sidebar) and mobile (respects safe areas, z-index 45 below nav z-50).

features_verified.beneficiaries_add_slidepanel: YES - data-testid='slide-panel' found on Add Beneficiary click
features_verified.beneficiaries_edit_slidepanel: YES - form prepopulated with beneficiary data
features_verified.messages_create_slidepanel: YES - data-testid='slide-panel' found on Create Message click
features_verified.messages_edit_slidepanel_no_navigate: YES - edit pencil opens SlidePanel inline, not /messages/:id/edit route
features_verified.vault_upload_slidepanel: YES - data-testid='slide-panel' found on Upload Document click
features_verified.vault_edit_slidepanel: YES - data-testid='slide-panel' found on edit pencil click
features_verified.dav_no_popup_second_entry: YES (code verified) - wasFirstEntry check + sessionStorage flag
features_verified.slidepanel_back_button: YES - data-testid='slide-panel-back' present on all panels
features_verified.navigation_fast_loading: YES - Dashboard loaded in 1.09s, core pages eagerly imported
